EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that direct debit details have been updated.
EmailTemplate.name: Updated DD
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Details Updated
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
This has now been updated on our system and the first/next payment is due to be debited from this account on xx.xx.xx
If you need anything else then please do not hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
